MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or Alternatively, For Summary Adjudication Of Claims
Off Calendar Oct-19-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Jeffrey Golden, Esq. 714-966-1000 Golden Goodrich for Defendant Adam Winter.
No other Appearance.

Discussed. Mr. Golden informs the Court a bankruptcy was filed late last night yesterday. A notice of stay of proceedings is pending on e-filing. Mr. Golden requests to take the matter off-calendar. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or Alternatively, For Summary Adjudication Of Claims.

Off-calendar per request of the party and approval of the court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2023 Continued To Jan-16-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or Alternatively, For Summary Adjudication Of Claims
Off Calendar Sep-08-2023 Continued To Oct-19-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or Alternatively, For Summary Adjudication Of Claims
Off Calendar Jul-24-2023 Continued To Sep-21-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):
Elizabeth Aronson, Esq., Aldridge Pite, LLP, (858) 750-7600, for Plaintiff.
Jeffrey Ian Golden, Esq., Golden Goodrich LLP, (714) 966-1000, for Defendant.

Ruling - DISCUSSED. Counsel confirms that a stipulation to continue the subject motion is pending in the court's e-filing queue. The court acknowledges the stipulated request to continue the motion and counsel is advised that any request to move the trial, and trial related date(s), will need to be done so with Dept. 206. The court and counsel agree in open court to a continuance date for this motion. Plaintiff JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, Or Alternatively, For Summary Adjudication of Claims is continued to Sep-21-2023 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2023 Set For Trial On Sep-25-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
